hero.title: Engineered for Elite Movement
hero.subtitle: KS Group Concierge delivers precision mobility solutions for athletes and high-performance professionals.

request.title: Request Concierge
request.subtitle: Share your itinerary or request. We respond quickly with options and confirmation.
request.detailsPlaceholder: Passengers, luggage, preferences, pickup address, flight number, deadlines, etc.
request.note: Discretion guaranteed. We do not publish client information.

services.title: Tailored support. Anywhere. Anytime.
services.subtitle: From private aviation to relocation and lifestyle arrangements — we coordinate every detail with discretion.

elite.title: Elite Mobility
elite.desc: VIP transfers, close protection coordination, priority access and discreet routing.

aviation.title: Private Aviation
aviation.desc: Charter sourcing, route planning, onboard preferences and ground handling.

ground.title: Ground Mobility
ground.desc: Chauffeur-driven vehicles, premium rentals, multi-city logistics and standby service.

relocation.title: Relocation & Logistics
relocation.desc: Relocation assistance, storage, moving coordination and priority deliveries.

lifestyle.title: Lifestyle & Experiences
lifestyle.desc: Dining, events, reservations, curated experiences and special occasions.

corporate.title: Corporate Support
corporate.desc: Executive assistance: travel packs, schedules, venues, interpreters and vendor coordination.

band.title: Ready when you are.
band.desc: Send your request and we’ll confirm the details quickly.

how.metaTitle: How it works — KS Group Concierge
how.title: Simple, fast, discreet.
how.subtitle: Submit your request, we confirm details and pricing, then we execute with precision.

s1.title: Submit
s1.desc: Tell us what you need: dates, locations, preferences, budget and urgency.

s2.title: Confirm
s2.desc: We clarify details, confirm availability, and send a clear plan and cost.

s3.title: Deliver
s3.desc: We coordinate end-to-end and share updates until completion.

s4.title: Follow-up
s4.desc: We provide post-service follow-up to ensure everything meets your expectations.

rules.title: Rules & Process
rules.li1: Submit your request via the form or WhatsApp.
rules.li2: Provide date, location, budget and preferences.
rules.li3: A deposit may be required to confirm certain services.
rules.li4: Third-party costs (tickets, reservations, etc.) follow supplier terms.

sla.title: Service Commitment (SLA)
sla.desc: Estimated response times depending on request priority.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Which areas do you operate in?
faq.q3: Can I modify or cancel a request?

band.title: Ready to get started?
band.desc: Send your request and we will handle the rest.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.intro: This website is operated by the entity identified below. If you have any questions about these notices, please contact us using the details provided.
legal.servicesText: KS Group Concierge provides high-end concierge coordination services, including sourcing options, booking assistance, and logistics coordination through trusted third-party suppliers.
legal.thirdPartyText: Unless expressly stated otherwise in writing, KS Group Concierge does not directly operate transportation, accommodation, venues, or other third-party services. Supplier terms may apply.
legal.confText: Client discretion is a core principle. Information relating to client identities, travel plans, bookings, and preferences is treated as confidential and disclosed only when necessary to fulfil requested services or when legally required.
legal.ipText: All website content including text, branding, graphics, and service descriptions is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. Unauthorized reproduction or commercial use is prohibited.
legal.disclaimerText: While every effort is made to ensure service quality and reliability, availability and third-party supplier performance cannot be guaranteed. KS Group Concierge acts as a coordinator and is not responsible for the operational conduct of independent suppliers.
legal.lawText: Unless otherwise required by mandatory consumer laws, disputes relating to this website and these notices will be handled under the laws of [Insert jurisdiction].

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: KS Group Concierge is committed to protecting the privacy and discretion of its clients. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect personal data when you use our website and concierge services.

collect.li1: Name, contact information and communication details.
collect.li3: Booking information required for service fulfilment.
collect.li4: Technical data required for website functionality and security.

privacy.purposeText: Personal information is used to respond to enquiries, coordinate concierge services, manage bookings, and communicate with clients regarding requested services.
privacy.vipText: We apply strict confidentiality standards. Personal information is shared only with trusted service providers when necessary to deliver the requested service, or where required by law.

legalBases.li1: Contract / pre-contract steps: to provide requested services and manage bookings.
legalBases.li2: Legitimate interests: service quality, security, fraud prevention, business operations.
legalBases.li3: Legal obligation: accounting and regulatory requirements (where applicable).
legalBases.li4: Consent: where required (e.g., optional marketing or certain cookies).

privacy.internationalText: Concierge requests may involve international travel and suppliers. Where necessary, data may be transferred internationally with appropriate safeguards consistent with applicable law.

rights.li1: Access, correction, deletion, restriction, and portability (where applicable).
rights.li2: Object to processing based on legitimate interests.
rights.li3: Withdraw consent at any time (where processing relies on consent).
rights.li4: Lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

privacy.cookiesText: See our Cookies Policy for details.
privacy.securityText: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to safeguard client data against unauthorised access, disclosure, or misuse.

terms.metaTitle: Terms of Service — KS Group Concierge
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms govern your use of KS Group Concierge and the coordination services we provide. By submitting a request or using this website, you agree to these Terms.
terms.scopeText: KS Group Concierge provides bespoke lifestyle and travel coordination services. We assist in sourcing options, arranging bookings, and managing logistics with third-party suppliers.
terms.thirdPartyText: Many services are delivered by independent suppliers. Supplier terms may apply in addition to these Terms. We coordinate and assist, but do not control supplier operations unless explicitly stated in writing.

pricing.li1: A concierge coordination fee may apply and will be disclosed before confirmation.
pricing.li2: Some services require deposits or pre-payment to secure availability.
pricing.li3: Third-party supplier charges may be payable as required by suppliers.

terms.cancellationText: Cancellations and changes are subject to supplier rules and timelines. Concierge fees may be non-refundable where work has begun or supplier costs have been incurred.

client.li1: Provide accurate details (dates, locations, names, preferences).
client.li2: Comply with venue rules, local laws, and supplier terms.

terms.confText: We treat client requests as confidential and share details only with parties necessary to deliver the service, unless disclosure is required by law.

liability.li1: We are not liable for acts or omissions of independent third-party suppliers.
liability.li2: To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect or consequential losses.
liability.li3: Where permitted, liability is limited to the concierge fee paid for the relevant request.

terms.liabilityNote: Nothing limits liability where it cannot be excluded under applicable law.
terms.lawText: These Terms are governed by the laws of [Insert jurisdiction], unless mandatory consumer laws provide otherwise.

cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.intro: Cookies are small text files stored on your device. We use them to make the website function, improve performance, and understand usage. Where required, we ask for consent for non-essential cookies.

types.li1: Essential: required for core website functions and security.
types.li2: Preferences: remember choices such as language selection.
types.li3: Analytics: help us understand website usage and improve experience.
types.li4: Marketing: used to measure campaigns or show relevant messages if enabled.

cookies.usedText: Currently this website uses essential functionality cookies and may store language preferences.
cookies.manageText: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Blocking cookies may affect certain website functions.
